summary: Excluded synthetic group-parent transactions from triage and bulk retag selection.
reason: Group parents have no group_parent_id, so child-only filters let aggregate rows into triage voting and bulk-retag API updates. Mirroring the canonical transaction-tier rule keeps synthetic totals out of user-facing mutation and review workflows. Closes Greptile P1 threads on PR #624.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes, including group-parent exclusions for triage and retag.
